titleStmt.title: SII 38.147: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 147. (A.R. No. 147 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the tenth pillar of the verandah, round the central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Beginning portion of this inscription is damaged. It commences with the meykīrtti of the king, Tiṅgaḷēr taru-taṉ.

It records that a dēvaraḍiyāḷ of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr, Śaduraṉ Śaduri, the wife of Nāgaṉ Peruṅkāḍaṉ donated ninety-five sheep for burning a perpetual lamp for the god of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr. The shepherds belonging to the locality called Tribhuvanasundarachēri at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr, received the sheep and agreed to measure out a total of ninety naḻi of ghee every year at the rate of one uḻakku daily at the temple treasury.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷer tarutaṉ ṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaik kīḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ
puṇarntu karuṅkalikaṭintu maṉṉu pala
virakeraḷaṉai Āṉaikkiṭuvittu
ṇṭapayyaṉait ticaikeṭat tollaiyuḷ mullaiyuḷ yān turatti Olkalil veṇṇāṭṭarai
caic coṇāṭṭotukki mevu pukaḻi Irāmakuṭamuvar keṭa muṉintu makiḻa kān=taḷūrccālai
kalamaṟuttāhavamallanu mañcaṟ kevutaṉ ṟāṅkarum paṭaiyālāṅkavar ceṉaiyilk kaṇṭa
ppayyaṉum kaṅkātiranum vaṇṭamar kaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭiyat tiṇṭiṟal viritara vikkiyum vicaiyā
tittaṉum karumuraṭcāṅkamaiyun mutaliṉa camara piruvottuṭaiya nimar cuṭar poṉ
ṉoṭayṅkerip puraviyoṭum piṭittut taṉ tāṭaiyiṟ cayaṅkoṇṭu tuṉ koḷ
ḷippākkai Uḷḷeri maṭuppittoru tanittaṇṭāṟ poru tiraiyuṭuttilai valakki
kali muṭi varintu muṉṟaṉakkuṭain=ta teṉṟamiḻ maṇṭala muḻuvatum Eḻ
kaṭaliḻam pukkilaṅkecaṉanākki vikkirama
tta tākittaṉ kaṉṉakucciyilum kātal Īḻaciriteṉ
ṟeṇṇi Uḷaṅkoḷ nāṭu taṉṉuṟavoṭum pukun=ta viḷaṅkumuṭi ka
vitta viracalāmekaṉ porkaḷattañcit taṉ kāṟ kaḷiṟiḻintu kavvai
yaṟṟoṭi kātaliyoṭu n=taṉṟavvaiyaip piṭittut tāyai
mukkariya ĀṅkavimāṉamRead āṅkavamāṉamniṅkutaṟkāka miṭṭumvantu vāṭṭo
ḻiliḻantu veṅkaḷattulanat ciṅkaḷattaraicaṉ poṉṉaṇi mu
ṭiyuṅ kaṉṉaraṉ vaḻivanturai koḷavviḻattaraicanākiya cir vallava
ṉ mataṉarājavaraiyu melloḷittaṭamaṇi muṭi taṭintu vaṭapulattirukālāva
tum porupaṭai nāṭātti tikkaṇṭaṉ tiṉakaraṉ nārāṇaṉ kaṇavati vaṇṭalar
teriyal maticūtaṉeṉ ṟeṉaip palvavaraicarai muṉaiviyiṟṟuratti
vampalar taruporuṟ kampilinakaruṭ caḷukkiyar māḷikai takaḻ pittiḷakka mi
l tāḷata muṉvanta kan=tar kaḷiṟṟuc cakkaravartti vikkiyannāraṇaṉ ṟaṉ perumpa
ṭai Iraiyeviḻaṉ pamara Āhavamallaṉumañciṉa neṉṉumalai
meṟkoṇṭu taṇpuṉaṟ periyāṟṟaṭai kaṇpūṇṭuk kaṭakamāṉaka vā
yil muṉṟā muṟaiyiṉu ṟetir viṭṭa Iḷaṅkiṭa neṭunelt teluṅka vi
ccaiyaṉ ṟammiyar Iruvarum vampiyaittilakkai nukatarājaṉum mi
ttiyi kaḷiṟṟuppiṭikkac coḻaṉum toṇṭairājaṉuṅkaḷicilai
mañceyaṉuya taṇṭanāyakaṉ tārttaṉañceyaṉum virappaiya
ṉum viramāṇikkaṉuṅ pira Eṉaippaṭaiñaroṭu Etircamartu tiruvaraṉ
kaviccayaṉum makaṉu mātāvum Eṉumivar mutaliyar Eṇṇarum kaḷi
rait tuṇṇeṉap piṭippitteḻarai Ilakkam pāḻpaṭac ciṉaviṟ pūṇ
ṭur patiyaip poṭṭiypaṭuttavaiyil Īṇṭuṟak kaḻutaiērcela naṭātti va
ṭṭikai vitaittu maṇṇain tiṟappeyil pār varu māḷikai paṭareri parappi Āṅ
ka māṉakar veṅkai mīteḻuti Uyar jayastampamnāṭṭuvitti pal Icaivil villa
var miṉavar veḷpulac caḷukkiyar villavar kaucalar vaṅkaṇar koṅkaṇāṭṭut
turar Aiyyaṇar ciṅkaḷar paṅkaḷar Antaraṅkalarai Aracariṭu tiṟaikaḷum Āṟi
loṉṟavaṉiyiṟ kūṟukoḷ poruḷkaḷum Ukattu nāṉmaṟaiyavar mukantu koḷak
kuṭuttu viśvaloṟṟettuRead as viśvalokatviḷaṅku maṉuneṟi niṉṟaśvametañ ce
ytaracar viṟṟirunta jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaṉ Uyarn=ta perum pukaṭ kovirāja
kesaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu muppattoṉṟāva
tu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattup puḻaṟkoṭṭattup puḻalnāṭṭut tiru
voṟṟiyūr Uṭaiya mahādevar Ācandrakālamum Oru tirunun=tā viḷakku Erip
pataṟku Ivvūrt tevaraṭiyāḷ nākaṉ peruṅkāṭaṉaka muṭaiyāḷ ca
turaṉ caturi vaitta cāvāmuvāp perāṭu toṇṇūṟṟaiñcu Iv
vāṭu toṇṇūṟṟaiñcuṅ koṇṭu nittam Uḻakku neyyāka Āṇṭu
varai toṇṇūṟṟu nāḻi ney Ittevar perumpaṇṭārattu Ācan=tirar
kālamum Aḷakkak kaṭavomāka kaikkoṇṭom Ivvūr tiripuvaṉacun=tarac
ceri maṉṟāṭi tirumāl puṉṉaiyum Irupattu nālvak keraḷamūrtti A
yya nampiyum tiruvoṟṟiyūr maṉṟāṭi kaṇavati ceriyum paṭampakka nāyakka
ceraṉu cūṟṟi tirumaṇiyum kāraṇaiviṭaṅkakkoṉum kaliyāṉ paṭṭaṉ nirañcan maṉ
ṟāṭiyum paṭṭaṉ kaliyaṉāna poṟkoyiṟkoṉum kiḷaiyaṉpanāpaṉṉum
Āka Ivviṉaivomuḷḷiṭṭa tirupuvaṉacutaraceri maṉṟāṭikaḷom Ivarkaḷincomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.147 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
